summary: Video with a Trump voiceover ('America will reclaim its rightful place as the greatest... nation on Earth... the future is ours') over instrumental music and large on-screen captions. Color graded shots are cut to the music: a windblown American flag, Trump saluting in a red cap beside a uniformed officer, a B-2 bomber with fighter jets alongside, a packed arena with a '60TH PRESIDENTIAL' banner, and Trump walking through a steel mill past rows of workers in hard hats.

script.scene: Desaturated low-angle shot of a tattered American flag on a pole against a grey sky; caption 'RIGHTFUL PLACE'. Trump voiceover begins: 'America will reclaim its rightful place as the greatest, most powerful... nation on Earth.'
Trump in a red cap and dark suit saluting on a reviewing stand beside a uniformed Army officer; caption 'NATION ON EARTH,'. Color graded footage of a military event.
Low-angle silhouette of a B-2 bomber flanked by fighter jets in a teal sky; caption 'AND ADMIRATION'. Voiceover: 'inspiring the awe and admiration of the entire world.'
Backlit shot of Trump gesturing in front of a packed arena, banner reading '60TH PRESIDENTIAL'; caption 'WILL STAND IN OUR WAY'. Voiceover: 'nothing will stand in our way because we are Americans.'
Trump walking through an industrial steel mill past rows of workers in hard hats; caption 'THE FUTURE IS OURS.' Voiceover: 'the future's ours.'
